create_sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."documento_cip" ADD CONSTRAINT "r_controleversao_doc_cip_merge" FOREIGN KEY ("nu_versao_com_merge", "id_doc_com_merge") REFERENCES "public"."controleversao"("versao", "id") ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
drop_sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."documento_cip" DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS "r_controleversao_doc_cip_merge";

create_sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."documento_cip" ADD CONSTRAINT "r_controleversao_documento_cip" FOREIGN KEY ("nu_versao_sem_merge", "id_doc_sem_merge") REFERENCES "public"."controleversao"("versao", "id") ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION;
drop_sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."documento_cip" DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS "r_controleversao_documento_cip";

create_sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."controleversao" ADD CONSTRAINT "controleversao_pkey" PRIMARY KEY (id, versao);
drop_sql: ALTER TABLE "public"."controleversao" DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS "controleversao_pkey";

create_sql: CREATE INDEX akcontroleversaousuario ON public.controleversao USING btree (co_usuario_implantacao);
CREATE INDEX controleversaodata ON public.controleversao USING btree (alt_data, id);
